bullets: • Data interpretation involves three key steps: introduce the chart, give an overview, and provide detailed information.
• Introduce the chart by stating what it is about and paraphrasing the title.
• Give an overview by mentioning main trends without detailed data.
• Provide detailed information, grouping data and mentioning similarities and differences.
• Use appropriate sentence structures and tenses to describe changes clearly.
raw:
• Data interpretation involves three key steps: introduce the chart, give an overview, and provide detailed information.
• Introduce the chart by stating what it is about and paraphrasing the title.
• Give an overview by mentioning main trends without detailed data.
• Provide detailed information, grouping data and mentioning similarities and differences.
• Use appropriate sentence structures and tenses to describe changes clearly.
